---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    listings: false
    documentclass: standalone
    classoption: ["border=0pt"]
    keep-tex: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{tabularx}
  - \usepackage{array}
  - \usepackage{makecell}
  - \input{macros_fig3_nr.tex}
---


```{=latex}
\newlength{\SavedTextWidthC}
\setlength{\SavedTextWidthC}{\textwidth}

\begingroup
\providecommand{\+}{+}% neutralise \+ localement
\renewcommand{\.}{.}% neutralise \. localement

\noindent
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{0pt}%
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1}%

\begin{tabular}{>{\centering\arraybackslash}p{.25\paperwidth}
                >{\centering\arraybackslash}p{.25\paperwidth}
                >{\centering\arraybackslash}p{.25\paperwidth}
                >{\centering\arraybackslash}p{.25\paperwidth}}
\small\bfseries \shortstack{Number of days\\ per year with\\ precipitation} &
\small\bfseries \shortstack{Annual\\ total\\ precipitation} &
\small\bfseries \shortstack{10-year return\\ level of daily\\ precipitation} &
\small\bfseries \shortstack{10-year return\\ level of hourly\\ precipitation} \\[-0.5mm]

\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/jour_pluie.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/mean_pluie_jour.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/nr_pluie_jour.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 2.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/nr_pluie_horaire.pdf} \\[-0.5mm]

\small $r=\ \rJourPluie$ \ (n=\ \nJourPluie) &
\small $r=\ \rMeanPluieJour$ \ (n=\ \nMeanPluieJour) &
\small $r=\ \rNRJour$ \ (n=\ \nNRJour) &
\small $r=\ \rNRHoraire$ \ (n=\ \nNRHoraire) \\[-0.5mm]

\small $ME=\ \meJourPluie\,\mathrm{d}\,(\mathbf{\dJourPluie}\%)$ &
\small $ME=\ \meMeanPluieJour\,\mathrm{mm/yr}\,(\mathbf{\dMeanPluieJour}\%)$ &
\small $ME=\ \meNRJour\,\mathrm{mm}\,(\mathbf{\dNRJour}\%)$ &
\small $ME=\ \meNRHoraire\,\mathrm{mm}\,(\mathbf{\dNRHoraire}\%)$\\[-0.5mm]

\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/jour_pluie_diff.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/mean_pluie_jour_diff.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/nr_pluie_jour_diff.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/nr_pluie_horaire_diff.pdf} \\[-0.5mm]

\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/jour_pluie_rdiff.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/mean_pluie_jour_rdiff.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/nr_pluie_jour_rdiff.pdf} &
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth - 1.5mm, trim=14 0 0 0, clip]{figures/nr_pluie_horaire_rdiff.pdf}
\end{tabular}

\endgroup
```
